message:
fuzz: add stateful fuzz target for command sequences

Add fuzz_runtime_sequence target for structure-aware stateful fuzzing:
- Generates arbitrary sequences of Redis commands using Arbitrary derive
- Covers string, list, set, hash, sorted set, and key commands
- Executes against fresh Store per iteration
- Guards against OOM with size limits on keys/values/sequences

Tests command interactions and state machine invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -66,3 +66,10 @@ path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_command_parse.rs"
 test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_runtime_sequence"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_runtime_sequence.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
